name: Loan Calculator
description: Calculate monthly payment, interest, and total repayment.
hubDescription: Installment loans: monthly payment, total interest, payoff date, and amortization with optional extra payments.

name: Debt Snowball & Avalanche Calculator
description: Map out an accelerated payment plan to crush credit card, car, and personal debts. Choose between Snowball or Avalanche strategies and visualize your debt-free date.
hubDescription: Snowball vs. avalanche payoff planner with debt-free date, interest saved vs. minimums, and balance timeline chart.

name: Loan Offer Comparison Tool
description: Compare 2 to 3 auto or personal loan offers side-by-side. Factor in interest rates, terms, and closing fees to reveal the true cheapest loan.
hubDescription: Compare 2–3 loan offers side-by-side with true total cost, effective APR (fees included), and a clear winner banner.

name: Mortgage Calculator
description: Estimate mortgage repayments and long-term borrowing costs.
hubDescription: Home loans with escrow, affordability signals, 15 vs 30 year comparison, and full amortization.

name: Rent vs. Buy Calculator
description: Compare long-term net worth when renting versus buying a home.
hubDescription: Compare the long-term net worth of renting vs. buying a home. Factor in mortgage rates, property appreciation, inflation, and investment opportunity costs.

name: Car Loan Calculator
description: Compare vehicle financing scenarios before committing.
hubDescription: Auto financing with affordability bands, term comparisons, and total cost of ownership signals.

name: Interest Calculator
description: Explore simple and compound growth over time.
hubDescription: Simple vs compound interest—model savings growth or the cost of carrying a balance.

name: Retirement Calculator
description: Project retirement balance, funding gap, and readiness.
hubDescription: Contribution-led retirement projections with inflation-adjusted goals and funding gap readouts.
